title: myoxanthus mejiae
intro: Myoxanthus mejiae, also known as the Mejia's orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Myoxanthus mejiae is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
